# growthbook_attribute (Resource)

A GrowthBook targeting attribute. Attributes describe the properties of a user (e.g. `id`, `country`) and are used to target feature flag rules and experiments.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "growthbook_attribute" "country" {
  property       = "country"
  datatype       = "string"
  description    = "ISO country code of the user"
  hash_attribute = false
  projects       = [growthbook_project.web.id]
}

resource "growthbook_attribute" "plan" {
  property = "plan"
  datatype = "enum"
  enum     = "free,pro,enterprise"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `datatype` (String) The attribute datatype. One of `boolean`, `string`, `number`, `secureString`, `enum`, `string[]`, `number[]`, `secureString[]`.
- `property` (String) The attribute property name. This is the attribute's unique identifier. Changing this forces a new attribute.

### Optional

- `archived` (Boolean) Whether the attribute is archived.
- `description` (String) Description of the attribute.
- `enum` (String) Comma-separated list of allowed values when `datatype` is `enum`.
- `format` (String) The attribute's format. One of `` (none), `version`, `date`, `isoCountryCode`.
- `hash_attribute` (Boolean) Whether this attribute should be hashed when used for bucketing.
- `projects` (List of String) Project IDs this attribute is scoped to. Empty means all projects.
- `tags` (List of String) Tags applied to the attribute.
